project.name: AI 接口自动化测试平台
project.styleDefinitionBrief: B2B dev-tool dashboard, dark navy sidebar + cool blue primary, Inter + JetBrains Mono, compact data density, professional utilitarian
project.designRead: QA test platform dashboard / developers & QA engineers / industrial utilitarian trust / medium-high density / avoid neon AI hero

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: single blue brand hue for primary actions and active states
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: no secondary/accent brand hue; identities use neutral or primary tints; method colors via semantic tokens
colorSystem.stateColors: semantic success/warning/error/info tokens for status badges and tags

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: restrained radius: sm=4px, md=8px, lg=12px, full=9999px
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Inter for body/display, JetBrains Mono for code/URLs; 14px base, tight leading for data
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: border-led cards, minimal shadow, monospace for code values
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: border-first surfaces; shadow only for floating layers (modals/dropdowns)
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: SVG icons inline, no decorative images in dashboard

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: fixed left sidebar (240px, dark navy #0f172a) + sticky top header with page title + date
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Inter body/display, JetBrains Mono code, 14px base
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: border-first cards (1px #e2e8f0), shadow only for elevated/floating
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: filled blue primary, ghost/outline secondary, 8px radius
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: 8px base grid, 16px section gaps, 24px page padding

pages.title: 仪表盘
pages.visualNorthStar: clean data dashboard with 4 stat cards + recent activity table, minimal decoration, fast data scanning

continuityAnchors.sidebarTreatment: dark navy sidebar with active blue highlight

pages.soulElement: stat cards use colored left-border accent instead of icon prefix for cleaner data scanning

pages.title: 快速测试
pages.visualNorthStar: Postman-like interface with URL bar at top, tabbed config below, dark code console at bottom

continuityAnchors.sidebarTreatment: dark navy sidebar with active blue highlight

pages.soulElement: method selector uses colored pill badges (GET=blue, POST=green) instead of plain dropdown for instant visual identification

pages.title: 用例管理
pages.visualNorthStar: data table with filters toolbar at top, inline method badges, compact row layout for scanning many cases

continuityAnchors.sidebarTreatment: dark navy sidebar with active blue highlight

pages.soulElement: colored method pills (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) as the primary visual anchor in each row for fast scanning

pages.title: AI 助手
pages.visualNorthStar: chat-style layout with suggestion cards at top, conversation thread below, input bar at bottom

continuityAnchors.sidebarTreatment: dark navy sidebar with active blue highlight
continuityAnchors.typographyRhythm: Inter 14px base, mono for code blocks

pages.soulElement: AI suggestion cards with subtle gradient border-left accent, suggesting intelligence without being flashy
